description: Using the 'BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv' dataset in JASP, create a new composite variable named 'Plasticity' defined as the average of 'Extraversion' and 'Openness' ((Extraversion + Openness) / 2). Calculate the Mean and Standard Deviation for 'Plasticity' and perform a Pearson correlation between 'Plasticity' and 'Agreeableness'. Save the JASP project to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/PlasticityAnalysis.jasp' and create a text report at '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/plasticity_report.txt' containing the Mean of Plasticity, the Pearson r value, and the p-value.
